mapper.sql: id, org_id, username, real_name, avatar, mobile, email, `disable`, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE p.disable = 0 AND p.perm_code IS NOT NULL AND rp.role_id IN ( -- 子查询：获取用户的全量角色ID集合 SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} UNION SELECT ugr.role_id FROM sys_user_group_role ugr INNER JOIN sys_user_group_user ugu ON ugr.group_id = ugu.group_id INNER JOIN sys_user_group ug ON ug.id = ugu.group_id WHERE ugu.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ug.disable = 0 );

SELECT u.id, u.org_id AS orgId, o.org_name AS orgName, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.avatar, u.mobile, u.email, u.`disable`, u.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON u.org_id = o.id
(u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR u.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.org_id AS orgId, o.org_name AS orgName, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.avatar, u.mobile, u.email, u.`disable`, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON u.org_id = o.id WHERE u.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
